starter.title: Get oriented
starter.summary: Learn the layout and find an asset.

step1.title: The sidebar
step1.description: This is your hierarchy — companies, buildings, floors, zones. Click any level to focus on it.

step2.title: The top bar
step2.description: Shows where you are. Everything on the page belongs to this owner and changes as you move around.

step3.title: Find anything
step3.description: Search by name or any detail to find an asset fast.

step4.title: See it on the map
step4.description: Click a result to show it on the map or floor plan.

step1.title: Add a client
step1.description: Your space is a tree: Client → Building → Floor → Zone. Open this menu and choose 'Add Client'.

step2.title: Name it
step2.description: Your company or tenant name. Required.

step3.title: Industry
step3.description: Optional — just a label you can change later.

step5.title: It's in the sidebar
step5.description: Your client now appears here. Click it to work inside it.

step6.title: Add a building
step6.description: With the client selected, open this menu and choose 'Add Building'.

step9.title: The tree grows
step9.description: The building now sits under your client here — the hierarchy fills in as you go.

step10.title: Everything is per-owner
step10.description: This bar shows your location. Assets, devices, and access all change with the owner you select.

step11.title: Add a floor
step11.description: Select the building, open this menu, and choose 'Add Floor'.

step14.title: Add a zone
step14.description: Select the floor, open this menu, and choose 'Add Zone' — the smallest level.

step16.title: Done!
step16.description: Click 'Create'. You've built a full Client → Building → Floor → Zone hierarchy.

assetType.title: Create an asset type
assetType.summary: Make a reusable template for your assets.

step1.title: Asset types
step1.description: A type is a template for similar items, like 'Forklift'. Click 'Asset Types', then 'Create Type'.

step3.title: Color
step3.description: A visual tag to spot this type. Optional.

step4.title: Properties
step4.description: Fields every asset of this type should have, like Serial Number.

createAsset.title: Add an asset
createAsset.summary: Create one real item you track.

step1.title: Add an asset
step1.description: An asset is one real thing you track. Click here to add one.

step2.title: Name it
step2.description: This item's name or ID, like 'Forklift #3'. Required.

step3.title: Its type
step3.description: Pick the type you made — it fills in the right fields.

step4.title: Finish
step4.description: Click 'Next', add a device and location, then 'Create'.
